title: 7 Best Benchmark Email Alternatives in 2025 (Free & Paid)
meta_description: Looking for a Benchmark Email alternative? We compare the top options by price, features, and use case.
h1: Best Benchmark Email Alternatives in 2025: Honest Comparison
intro: While Benchmark Email is a capable platform, it is not the right fit for everyone. This guide covers the best Benchmark Email alternatives in 2025.
why_switch: You have outgrown Benchmark Email's free tier limits
You need features not available on this plan
Pricing does not scale well for your subscriber count

alternatives.name: Mailchimp
alternatives.key_difference: Mailchimp is built for beginners and small businesses and distinguishes itself through drag-drop editor and automation.

alternatives.name: ConvertKit
alternatives.key_difference: ConvertKit is built for creators, bloggers, and course sellers and distinguishes itself through visual automations and subscriber tagging.

alternatives.name: Beehiiv
alternatives.tagline: The newsletter platform built for growth
alternatives.key_difference: Beehiiv is built for newsletter publishers and media operators and distinguishes itself through newsletter monetisation and ad network.

alternatives.name: MailerLite
alternatives.tagline: Simple email marketing for small businesses
alternatives.best_for: small businesses and freelancers on a budget
alternatives.key_difference: MailerLite is built for small businesses and freelancers on a budget and distinguishes itself through drag-drop editor and automation.

alternatives.name: ActiveCampaign
alternatives.best_for: businesses needing advanced automation and CRM
alternatives.key_difference: ActiveCampaign is built for businesses needing advanced automation and CRM and distinguishes itself through advanced automation and CRM.

faq.q: What is the best free alternative to Benchmark Email?
faq.a: MailerLite and Brevo both offer generous free plans worth considering.

faq.q: What is the best Benchmark Email alternative for small business?
faq.a: For small businesses, MailerLite is frequently recommended due to its low cost and ease of use.

faq.q: Is there a cheaper alternative to Benchmark Email?
faq.a: Moosend and MailerLite consistently rank as the most affordable options with a comparable feature set.
